film.title: Dashavatar
film.overview: Two children are transported through time to learn about the 10 avatars of Lord Vishnu and discover that Vishnu took on various incarnations to combat evil in every era.

dialogues.dialogue: Praise be to Lord Vishnu! Praise be to Lord Vishnu! Shame on you! Stop chanting Vishnu's name. Forgive me father! Shall I stop chanting Vishnu's name? It is impossible! I am not worthy enough to say this.
Prince, who are you? Devi, I am Ram the prince of Ayodhya. I am impressed a lot by your radiance, beauty and pride. I want to marry you! Forgive me but I cannot marry you.

Please go and help my Lord! Really she is the most beautiful one! She will add to the pride of my kingdom. Not a slave but she is capable of becoming a queen. Mother, in no condition will you cross this line.
